response.overview: Spring turns into Summer and all across the land hot young studs hit the road in search of the big adventure. Buds pop up on bare branches to announce the coming of Spring. Likewise, these studs. pop up on roadways everywhere to announce their coming in Summer. Just in time to celebrate the coming season, STUDIO 2000 is releasing The Hitchhiker, a light and frisky tale of one very hot young hitchhiker, the man who picks him up and just what each goes through before they work it out-and then work it in and out.
response.tagline: Take a ride with a winner. Take a ride with The Hitchhiker.
response.title: The Hitchhiker
